word: G1536 - εἴ τις - eí tis - i tis - He that

sections.paragraph:
- Original: εἴτις

- Transliteration: Ei tis

- Phonetic: i tis

- Definition:

1. whoever, whatever

- Origin: from G1487 and G5100

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech:

- Strong's: From G1487 and G5100; if any: - he that if a (-ny) man (‘ s thing from any ought) whether any whosoever.
